creator: ady@freebsd.ady.ro
text:
The Pine group released version 4.10 of the Pine package. I have made two additions: patches for the so-called "remote exploit in pine" bug and a _TIMEZONE_ token addition for the reply-leadin feature. TODO: build shared versions of the libraries, discuss the mailcap/mime.types installation procedure, solve /var/mail/ locking issues, other patches to be included. This PR supercedes PR #10204. Fix: I have attached a compressed patchfile which upgrades the port from version 4.05 to 4.10. CVS committers please *note*: there are 2 new files introduced: * patches/patch-aa ("remote exploit in pine" bugfix) * patches/patch-ab (_TIMEZONE_ token addition) Thank you!
